attacking_style: Attacks on steep lower slopes of long climbs with 10+ km remaining, targeting both stage wins and intermediate bonus/KOM points. Capable of sustaining long-range efforts rather than explosive finale moves.
team_tactics: Operates with considerable autonomy when not GC-focused. Team support appears secondary to personal opportunism—will split efforts across stage for KOM points or attack independently on final climbs.
terrain_preference: Steep gradients on extended climbs (20+ km) where sustained power advantage matters. Struggles on flat stages and with race management logistics. Not a natural puncher despite climbing strength.
vulnerability: Flat stages expose weakness—lost GC time at team car through poor positioning. Form volatility: multi-year poor spell (pre-2022) suggests inconsistency. Less effective in explosive punchy finishes than pure mountain stages.
key_patterns: Targets bonus seconds and KOM points on intermediate climbs tactically, not just stage finish (2 instances)
Long-range solo attacks 10+ km from finish on steep sections when form present (2 instances)
Will prioritize KOM jersey tactics over stage result when GC not viable (2 instances)
Career form volatility: multi-year drought broken 2022, suggesting peaks require specific conditions (2 instances)
form_trajectory: positive: 2022 Giro win ended years-long drought, suggesting resurgence. 2023 TDF showed tactical intelligence still present even when not targeting stages.
